defs: The act or art of managing; the manner of treating, directing, carrying on, or using, for a purpose; conduct; administration; guidance; control; as, the management of a family or of a farm; the management of a business enterprise; the management of state affairs.

quotes: He had great managements with ecclesiastics.

defs: Judicious use of means to accomplish an end; conduct directed by art or address; skillful treatment; cunning practice; -- often in a bad sense.
quotes: Mark with what management their tribes divide Some stick to you, and some to t'other side.

defs: The collective body of those who manage or direct any enterprise or interest; the board of managers.
